title: FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS - 211info
text: OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES FLORENCE FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parent skills training, help accessing community resources, home management, and support services. 1445 8th Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Families receiving TANF benefits Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 997-6261 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 997-6261 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Families can be refereed by DHS Self Sufficiency Case Manager or self refer on Options website. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Referral documents AREA SERVED: Douglas and Lane Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Child Abuse Prevention Child Abuse Support Groups Parenting Skills Classes Specialized Information and Referral * Parenting Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
